chapter_title.en: On Etiquette and Encouraging Others to do Good

text: : سألته عن قول الله عز وجل: الذين يؤتون ما اتوا وقلوبهم وجلة، قال: من شفقتهم ورجائهم يخافون ان ترد إليهم أعمالهم ان لم يطيعوا الله وهو على كل شئ قدير وهم يرجون ان يتقبل منهم

en.shaykh-tahir-ridha-jaffer: 30.Al-Qāsim narrated from ʿAlī (a), from Abū ʿAbdillāh (a) whom he asked about the verse wherein Allah, to Whom belong might and majesty, says: And those who give whatever they give with their hearts fearful… (Q23:60) so he said, “[They are fearful] out of their concern and their hope; they fear that their deeds will be rejected if they do not obey Allah – and He has power over all things – and they hope that He accepts [their deeds] from them.”
